integrity.description: The debug report contains actual explanations of the bugs, not just copy-pasted prompt text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The solution has 3 bugs and 2 stubs. Bug 1 (ReportGenerator.cs): Severity labels 'Severe' and 'Moderate' are swapped. Bug 2 (ReportGenerator.cs): CalculateOnsetDays subtracts dates in the wrong order (enrollment - event). Bug 3 (StatisticsHelper.cs): CalculateEventRate uses integer division instead of double. Stub 1 (ReportAggregator.cs): CalculateWilsonScoreInterval needs the Wilson score formula. Stub 2 (ReportAggregator.cs): DetectExpeditedReportingFlags needs to filter events where CtcaeGrade>=4 AND Outcome is 'Death' or 'Life-Threatening' AND onset is <=15 days. When fixed, exactly 12 tests should pass. The final compliance_report.txt should reflect 6 expedited reporting flags out of 25 events.
